zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Beaufort Cardinal Bishop of Winchester於1376年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾凱特列索普時，他的父親John of Gaunt 1st Duke of Lancaster36歲，母親Katherine de Roet26歲。他去世於1447年4月11日在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆享年71歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾維古姆。

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English (originally French)   Beaufort  . It is found mainly among African Americans. Compare   Bluford  .

variants.name: Bluford
meanings: Possibly also English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place. The name occurs in records of the 19th century but is now extinct in the British Isles.
Variant of   Blueford  , a surname of English (ultimately French) origin. It is found mainly among African Americans.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Beaufort Cardinal Bishop of Winchester was born in 1376, in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John of Gaunt 1st Duke of Lancaster, was 36 and his mother, Katherine de Roet, was 26. He died on 11 April 1447, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Winchester, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Beaufort Cardinal Bishop of Winchester est né en 1376, à Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John of Gaunt 1st Duke of Lancaster, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Roet, avait 26 ans. Il est décédé le 11 avril 1447, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Beaufort Cardinal Bishop of Winchester 1376 in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John of Gaunt 1st Duke of Lancaster 36 und seine Mutter Katherine de Roet 26. Er starb am 11. April 1447 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Winchester, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Beaufort Cardinal Bishop of Winchester è nato il nel 1376 nel Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John of Gaunt 1st Duke of Lancaster, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Roet, aveva 26 anni. Morì il 11 aprile 1447, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Winchester, Hampshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Beaufort Cardinal Bishop of Winchester(이)가 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 케틀레소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John of Gaunt 1st Duke of Lancaster(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Roet(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1447년 4월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Beaufort Cardinal Bishop of Winchester родился в 1376 г. в местности кеттлетаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John of Gaunt 1st Duke of Lancaster было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Roet, 26. Он умер 11 апреля 1447 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия.
